title: meriania acostae
intro: Meriania acostae, also known as the "Golden Bell", is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Meriania acostae include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Meriania acostae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine in the tropical regions of Central and South America.
